user.title: Sign in to Migros
user.description:
To get your access token:
1. Open [migros.ch]({shopping_list_url}) and sign in.
2. Open your browser's developer tools (F12) and go to the **Network** tab.
3. Filter requests by `login-success`.
4. Reload the page — find the `login-success` request and open its **Response**.
5. Copy the entire JSON object (starting with `{`) or just the `accessToken` value and paste it below.

select_list.title: Select shopping list
select_list.description: Choose which Migros shopping list to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Migros
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Migros token has expired. Get a new one:
1. Open [migros.ch]({shopping_list_url}) and sign in.
2. Open your browser's developer tools (F12) and go to the **Network** tab.
3. Filter requests by `login-success`.
4. Reload the page — find the `login-success` request and open its **Response**.
5. Copy the entire JSON object (starting with `{`) or just the `accessToken` value and paste it below.

error.invalid_list_id: Shopping list ID was not found or is not accessible with this token.
error.no_lists: No shopping lists found for this account.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests to Migros. Please try again shortly.

abort.already_configured: This shopping list is already configured.
